svg.title: Animated premium chat intro for Edwards Moses
svg.desc: A GitHub profile README chat graphic introducing Edwards Moses with an avatar, three message beats, and a compact row of labeled call-to-action pills.

g.text: I design and ship web + mobile products
for teams that care about craft and clarity.
Lagos, Nigeria. Working with teams globally.
React, React Native, and pragmatic backend systems.
Shipping with teams through Toptal and direct builds.
